path: Problem: Sum values within a date window while filtering by a dynamic list of allowed categories (OR logic) from a specified range
Action: Use SUMIFS for the date-range criteria and category criterion, then wrap with SUMPRODUCT to aggregate SUMIFS results across a criteria list range

Observation: SUMIFS does not natively accept a multi-cell criteria range as an OR-list unless coerced into an array calculation; SUMPRODUCT (or equivalent array-enabler) sums the per-criterion SUMIFS outputs
